inputs.label: Daily Energy Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Total watt-hours used per day by all devices

businessContext_i18n.en: Total watt-hours used per day by all devices
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm cihazların günlük toplam watt-saat tüketimi
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Wattstunden pro Tag aller Geräte
businessContext_i18n.fr: Wattheures totaux utilisés par jour par tous les appareils
businessContext_i18n.es: Vatios-hora totales usados por día por todos los dispositivos
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي واط-ساعة المستخدمة يومياً بواسطة جميع الأجهزة

inputs.label: Average Sun Peak Hours
inputs.businessContext: Number of peak sun hours per day at the location

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of peak sun hours per day at the location
businessContext_i18n.tr: Konumdaki günlük zirve güneş saati sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Spitzen-Sonnenstunden pro Tag am Standort
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'heures d'ensoleillement maximal par jour à l'emplacement
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de horas pico de sol por día en la ubicación
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد ساعات الذروة الشمسية يومياً في الموقع

inputs.label: Solar Panel Wattage
inputs.businessContext: Rated power output of a single solar panel

businessContext_i18n.en: Rated power output of a single solar panel
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir güneş panelinin nominal güç çıkışı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Puissance nominale d'un seul panneau solaire
businessContext_i18n.es: Potencia nominal de salida de un solo panel solar

inputs.label: Tilt Angle Deviation
inputs.businessContext: Angular deviation from optimal sun alignment (0° = perpendicular)

businessContext_i18n.en: Angular deviation from optimal sun alignment (0° = perpendicular)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Optimum güneş hizasından açısal sapma (0° = dik)
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkelabweichung von der optimalen Sonnenausrichtung (0° = senkrecht)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart angulaire par rapport à l'alignement solaire optimal (0° = perpendiculaire)
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación angular respecto a la alineación óptima con el sol (0° = perpendicular)
businessContext_i18n.ar: الانحراف الزاوي عن المحاذاة المثلى للشمس (0° = عمودي)

inputs.label: System Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Overall system efficiency including charge controller, inverter, and wiring losses

businessContext_i18n.en: Overall system efficiency including charge controller, inverter, and wiring losses
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şarj kontrol cihazı, invertör ve kablo kayıplarını içeren genel sistem verimliliği
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtsystemeffizienz inkl. Laderegler, Wechselrichter und Leitungsverluste
businessContext_i18n.fr: Efficacité globale du système incluant les pertes du régulateur de charge, de l'onduleur et du câblage
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia general del sistema, incluyendo pérdidas del controlador de carga, inversor y cableado
businessContext_i18n.ar: كفاءة النظام الإجمالية بما في ذلك خسائر منظم الشحن والعاكس والأسلاك

inputs.label: Days of Autonomy
inputs.businessContext: Number of consecutive days the battery must supply energy without sun

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of consecutive days the battery must supply energy without sun
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pilin güneş olmadan enerji sağlaması gereken ardışık gün sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl aufeinanderfolgender Tage, die die Batterie ohne Sonne versorgen muss
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de jours consécutifs où la batterie doit fournir de l'énergie sans soleil
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de días consecutivos que la batería debe suministrar energía sin sol
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد الأيام المتتالية التي يجب أن توفر فيها البطارية الطاقة بدون شمس

inputs.businessContext: Nominal voltage of the battery bank

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal voltage of the battery bank
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tension nominale du parc de batteries
businessContext_i18n.es: Tensión nominal del banco de baterías

inputs.label: Depth of Discharge
inputs.businessContext: Maximum permissible discharge depth to preserve battery life (e.g., 50 for 50%)

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum permissible discharge depth to preserve battery life (e.g., 50 for 50%)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pil ömrünü korumak için izin verilen maksimum deşarj derinliği (ör. %50 için 50)
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximal zulässige Entladetiefe zur Schonung der Batterie (z. B. 50 für 50 %)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Profondeur de décharge maximale admissible pour préserver la durée de vie de la batterie (ex. 50 pour 50%)
businessContext_i18n.es: Profundidad de descarga máxima permitida para preservar la vida útil de la batería (ej. 50 para 50%)
businessContext_i18n.ar: أقصى عمق تفريغ مسموح به للحفاظ على عمر البطارية (مثل 50 لـ 50%)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
